- **Duração:** 00:35

---

## [00:00 - 00:35]

I am passionate about communication. My name is Matt Abrahams and I teach Strategic Communication and Effective Virtual Communication at Stanford Graduate School of Business. I firmly believe that your ability to communicate effectively makes a big difference in your personal and professional life and I am thrilled to be able to share ideas and best practices that you can follow to be a more effective communicator.
